creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 248711
Patch for libmicrohttpd

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)

Poudriere testport OK 12.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following consumers in 14.0-RELEASE (amd64) using Poudriere:
audio/faust
audio/faustlive
audio/inscore
devel/libkiwix
mail/mfmod_openmetrics
misc/ola
multimedia/kodi
multimedia/librist
multimedia/motion
multimedia/musikcube
net/libnpupnp
net/opensips31
net-p2p/xmrig
security/gsad
security/iddawc
www/janus
www/ulfius
www/wget2
